text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 54 

GAP_DAYS_INPP_1M 

LABEL: Gap In-Network Preferred Pharmacy — days in 1-month supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the number of days in a one-month supply of a drug on this tier, when using an 
in-network preferred pharmacy (INPP; also known as a preferred pharmacy within a split network) 
during the coverage gap phase of the Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG
